hooks.command: [ -d docs/wiki ] && { { git diff --name-only HEAD 2>/dev/null; git log --since='1 hour ago' --name-only --pretty=format: 2>/dev/null; } | grep -E '^(client/src/|supabase/(functions|migrations)/|shared/|src/pages/|src/components/|src/data/(changelog|features|competitors)\.ts)' | head -1 | grep -q . && echo 'WIKI_SYNC_NEEDED: Source code changed this session in client/src, supabase/(functions|migrations), shared, src/pages, src/components, or src/data. Before ending this turn, update the Obsidian vault: (1) append a [YYYY-MM-DD] entry to docs/wiki/log.md summarizing what shipped + the Linear ticket if any; (2) if a feature shipped, update docs/wiki/domains/product/features/<slug>.md (set status: shipped, add ship date); (3) refresh docs/wiki/hot.md so the next session has fresh context. Use absolute dates. Skip silently if changes were trivial (typo fixes, comment-only).'; } || true
[ -f docs/now.md ] && printf '\n- %s: Supabase change applied via MCP — verify wiki feature page + changelog entry\n' "$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M')" >> docs/now.md || true
[ -f docs/now.md ] && printf '\n- %s: Linear issue/comment updated — verify wiki feature page reflects new state\n' "$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M')" >> docs/now.md || true
